policy.rule: Every authored format must be registered. Questions in approved, published or live status must use a ready runtime contract today; richer preview-only formats must stay in draft/review until their renderer, scoring and accessibility support are complete.

ready_contracts.choice: body.prompt, body.choices with at least two choices, and expected_answer.value as a string or number.
ready_contracts.numeric: numeric body.a, numeric body.b and numeric expected_answer.value.
ready_contracts.trace: body.prompt, body.letter and expected_answer.value or expected_answer.rubric.
ready_contracts.model_sort: body.prompt, body.choices and expected_answer.value; renderer may translate labelled model choices into semantic answers.
